title: cyrtomium balansae
intro: Cyrtomium balansae, also known as the Balansa fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues. The medicinal properties of Cyrtomium balansae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being. Cyrtomium balansae can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, with potential health benefits including the reduction of blood pressure and the alleviation of symptoms associated with respiratory issues.
